verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm in that number, I'm in that number, I'm in that number robed in white; I'm in that number, I'm in that number, I'm in that number robed in white.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm in that number, That blood-washed number, I'm in that number robed in white; I'm in that number That blood-washed number, I'm in that number robed in white.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: John saw that number, The blood-washed number, John saw that number robed in white; John saw that number, That blood-washed number, John saw that number robed in white.
